actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour_0 (id: 314576056) on GameObject 'ClockText' matches script 'Clock' (guid: 27b31662383b39d4a9c98eb14ed39152). Serialized fields: time=0, clockText=fileID 314576054, BestTime=fileID 1936206876, finished=false. Let Update run for ~5s to accumulate time, then manually invoke onFinish() to stop the clock and call BestTime.checkTime(time). Note: No Collider/Rigidbody/EventTrigger present on ClockText.

Fresh run: MonoBehaviour_0 (id: 314576056) on 'ClockText' with the same serialized setup (guid: 27b31662383b39d4a9c98eb14ed39152). Ensure Start() has set finished=false and time starts at 0. Allow Update to run ~3s, then manually invoke onTimeOut() to stop the clock without calling BestTime.checkTime(). Note: No Collider/Rigidbody/EventTrigger present on ClockText.
